basic_details.job_title: IIIT Bhopal Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Technician, Junior Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Bhopal
basic_details.post_name: Junior Superintendent, Junior Technician, Junior Assistant
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Bhopal has released an official notification (Advt. No. IIITBpl/Estt./NFR/2026/1736, dated 14.07.2026) inviting online applications for 3 Non-Faculty (Non-Teaching) posts on a direct recruitment basis: Junior Superintendent, Junior Technician, and Junior Assistant. This article summarizes the official notification, including eligibility, age limit, salary, application fee, selection process, and how to apply.

application_fee.details: Application fees are payable only through the designated payment gateway on the Samarth Portal. Payments made through any other means will not be accepted.

age_limit.details: As per the notification, age, qualification, and experience will be evaluated as on the last date of online application submission, i.e., 08 August 2026. The date of birth mentioned in the SSC/Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Birth Certificate will be considered final. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India norms; no age relaxation is applicable to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against a UR vacancy.

qualification.details: Classification: Group-B Qualification: First class Bachelor's Degree with 6 years' experience in the relevant area Selection Type: Selection post Probation Period: One year | Classification: Group-C Qualification: Diploma in Engineering / Bachelor's Degree, or ITI with 2 years' experience Selection Type: Selection post Probation Period: One year | Classification: Group-C Qualification: Bachelor's Degree with knowledge of computer operations Selection Type: Selection post Probation Period: One year

salary_details.details: The final pay of the selected candidate will be fixed as per Government of India rules. Exact in-hand/gross salary figures are not mentioned in the official notification.

selection_process: The tentative method of selection for all three posts (Junior Superintendent
A Written Test/Examination comprising a General Aptitude/Ability Test Followed by a Discipline-Specific Proficiency/Skill Test
The Institute reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates called for the Written Test/Skill Test based on qualifications
and other academic achievements exceeding the minimum eligibility criteria. Mere fulfillment of essential qualifications does not guarantee a call for the test.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only; applications received through any other mode will be summarily rejected.
The link for the online application will be hosted on the Institute website.
Candidates should upload all relevant mark sheets, certificates, and experience documents along with the application.
Application fee (where applicable) must be paid only through the Samarth Portal payment gateway.
Candidates employed in PSUs/Government bodies/Universities/Autonomous Bodies must apply through proper channel with an uploaded NOC.

The direct application link/URL is not mentioned in the source notification; candidates should check the official IIIT Bhopal website for the live application link. For application-related technical issues, candidates can email [email protected].
important_instructions: Applicants must be citizens of India. Candidature remains provisional until document verification by the appointing authority; fraudulent claims of reserved category status will lead to debarment. The Institute may restrict the number of candidates called for the Written Test/Skill Test through additional shortlisting criteria. Shortlisted candidates' Application Numbers will be displayed only on the Institute website; no separate postal communication will be sent. Vacancy numbers are provisional and subject to variation; the Institute may not fill a post, or may fill additional vacancies. Appointment is subject to the candidate being declared medically fit by the competent authority. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Records of non-selected (excluding waitlisted) candidates will not be preserved beyond six months from the date of the final result. Any dispute related to the recruitment process is subject to courts/tribunals having jurisdiction over Bhopal. The Institute has clarified that selections are made purely on merit, and candidates are strongly advised not to pay money to any person assuring employment or to seek individual/political influence.

rows.information: Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT) Bhopal
Junior Superintendent, Junior Technician, Junior Assistant

content_sections.heading: IIIT Bhopal Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 3 vacancies are advertised across three Non-Faculty posts, all under the Unreserved (UR) category. As per the notification, the vacancy numbers are provisional and subject to variation; the Institute reserves the right to not fill a post or to fill additional vacancies.

content_sections.heading: IIIT Bhopal Eligibility Criteria & Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Classification: Group-B Qualification: First class Bachelor's Degree with 6 years' experience in the relevant area Selection Type: Selection post Probation Period: One year Classification: Group-C Qualification: Diploma in Engineering / Bachelor's Degree, or ITI with 2 years' experience Selection Type: Selection post Probation Period: One year Classification: Group-C Qualification: Bachelor's Degree with knowledge of computer operations Selection Type: Selection post Probation Period: One year

content_sections.heading: IIIT Bhopal Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: As per the notification, age, qualification, and experience will be evaluated as on the last date of online application submission, i.e., 08 August 2026. The date of birth mentioned in the SSC/Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Birth Certificate will be considered final. Age relaxation will be as per Government of India norms; no age relaxation is applicable to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against a UR vacancy.

content_sections.heading: IIIT Bhopal Salary / Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: The final pay of the selected candidate will be fixed as per Government of India rules. Exact in-hand/gross salary figures are not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IIIT Bhopal Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: Application fees are payable only through the designated payment gateway on the Samarth Portal. Payments made through any other means will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: IIIT Bhopal Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: The tentative method of selection for all three posts (Junior Superintendent, Junior Technician, and Junior Assistant) consists of: A Written Test/Examination comprising a General Aptitude/Ability Test Followed by a Discipline-Specific Proficiency/Skill Test The Institute reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates called for the Written Test/Skill Test based on qualifications, salary, relevance of experience, and other academic achievements exceeding the minimum eligibility criteria. Mere fulfillment of essential qualifications does not guarantee a call for the test.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Mark sheets and certificates supporting all educational qualifications Experience certificates relevant to the post applied for Official percentage conversion certificate (if the qualifying degree marks are in SGPA/CGPA/CPI or any other grading system) No Objection Certificate (NOC) — mandatory for candidates currently working in PSUs, Central/State Government Undertakings, Universities, Semi-Government Institutions, or Autonomous Bodies, uploaded at the time of application Category certificate, if claiming SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD benefits Proof of date of birth (SSC/Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Birth Certificate) All uploaded documents must be clear, visible, and readable. Original documents will be required at the time of document verification and at the time of joining.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online only; applications received through any other mode will be summarily rejected. The link for the online application will be hosted on the Institute website. Candidates should upload all relevant mark sheets, certificates, and experience documents along with the application. Application fee (where applicable) must be paid only through the Samarth Portal payment gateway. Candidates employed in PSUs/Government bodies/Universities/Autonomous Bodies must apply through proper channel with an uploaded NOC. The direct application link/URL is not mentioned in the source notification; candidates should check the official IIIT Bhopal website for the live application link. For application-related technical issues, candidates can email [email protected] .

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions (As Per Official Notification)
content_sections.text: Applicants must be citizens of India. Candidature remains provisional until document verification by the appointing authority; fraudulent claims of reserved category status will lead to debarment. The Institute may restrict the number of candidates called for the Written Test/Skill Test through additional shortlisting criteria. Shortlisted candidates' Application Numbers will be displayed only on the Institute website; no separate postal communication will be sent. Vacancy numbers are provisional and subject to variation; the Institute may not fill a post, or may fill additional vacancies. Appointment is subject to the candidate being declared medically fit by the competent authority. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Records of non-selected (excluding waitlisted) candidates will not be preserved beyond six months from the date of the final result. Any dispute related to the recruitment process is subject to courts/tribunals having jurisdiction over Bhopal. The Institute has clarified that selections are made purely on merit, and candidates are strongly advised not to pay money to any person assuring employment or to seek individual/political influence.

faq.question: Q1. What posts are advertised in IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: IIIT Bhopal has advertised 3 Non-Faculty posts: Junior Superintendent, Junior Technician, and Junior Assistant, with 1 vacancy each under the UR category.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closing date is 08 August 2026, up to 5:30 PM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is Rs. 1000/- (non-refundable) for UR/EWS/OBC candidates. SC/ST/Women/PwBD candidates are exempted from the fee. Fees must be paid only through the Samarth Portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IIIT Bhopal Junior Superintendent, Junior Technician, and Junior Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 32 years for Junior Superintendent, and 27 years for both Junior Technician and Junior Assistant, as on the last date of application submission.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Junior Superintendent requires a First Class Bachelor's Degree with 6 years' relevant experience. Junior Technician requires a Diploma in Engineering/Bachelor's Degree or ITI with 2 years' experience. Junior Assistant requires a Bachelor's Degree with knowledge of computer operations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves a Written Test/Examination (General Aptitude/Ability Test) followed by a Discipline-Specific Proficiency/Skill Test.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates in IIIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Age relaxation follows Government of India norms; however, no age relaxation is applicable to SC/ST/OBC candidates applying against a UR vacancy, as this recruitment is entirely UR category.

faq.question: Q8. Is a No Objection Certificate (NOC) required for currently employed candidates?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates working in PSUs, Central/State Government Undertakings, Universities, Semi-Government Institutions, or Autonomous Bodies must apply through proper channel and upload an NOC, or they will not be allowed to appear in the Discipline-Specific Proficiency/Skill Test.
